# Copilot instructions

This repository is a curated AI builder resource library.

When adding or editing content:

- preserve the builder-centric scope: skills, prompts, instructions, MCP, frameworks, evals, workflows, and examples
- keep one resource per folder in `content/`
- include both `README.md` and `meta.yml` for resource entries
- prefer concise summaries that explain why a resource matters
- update category indexes or category `README.md` files when adding important entries
- run `node scripts/validate-metadata.js` before finishing
